title: callitriche terrestris subsp. subsessilis
intro: Callitriche terrestris subsp. subsessilis is a subspecies of the aquatic plant Callitriche terrestris, commonly known as water starwort, which is a type of plant that grows in aquatic environments. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Callitriche terrestris subsp. subsessilis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional herbal remedies as a powder or tincture.
